name: noc-wallboard
title: NOC Wallboard
description: Full-screen Network-Operations-Centre wallboard plane: a header (title + pulsing Live indicator + KPI status counters), a responsive 4-column grid of severity status tiles (stripe + pulsing dot, name, sublabel, big mono value, sparkline), and a scrolling Critical alert ticker. Composes the noc-kpi, noc-tile and ticker-item patterns inline so it renders fully self-contained. KPI counters double as single-select severity filters that dim non-matching tiles, and the ticker has a pause/play toggle.
